title: The Auroville Foundation Act, 1988
full_text: The Auroville Foundation Act, 1988 आरोविल प्रतिष्‍ठान अधिनियम, 1988 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198854 Act Number: 54 Enactment Date: 1988-09-29 Act Year: 1988 Short Title: The Auroville Foundation Act, 1988 Hindi Title: आरोविल प्रतिष्‍ठान अधिनियम, 1988 Long Title: An Act to provide for the acquisition and transfer of the undertakings of Auroville and to vest such undertakings in a foundation established for the purpose with a view to making long-term arrangements for the better management and further development of Auroville in accordance with its original charter and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 29-09-1988 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Auroville Foundation Act, 1988 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ACQUISITION AND TRANSFER OF UNDERTAKINGS OF AUROVILLE CHAPTER III THE AUROVILLE FOUNDATION CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Transfer to, and vesting in, the Central Government of certain undertakings of the Society, trust and bodies. Section 4. General effect of vesting. Section 5. Central Government or Foundation to be liable for certain prior liabilities. Section 6. Power of Central Government to direct vesting of the undertakings in the Foundation. Section 7. Management, etc., of the undertakings. Section 8. Duties of persons in charge of management by undertakings to deliver all assets. Section 9. Certain powers of the Central Government or the Foundation. Section 10. Establishment and incorporation of the Foundation. Section 11. Governing Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Term of office of members. Section 13. Salary and allowances and other conditions of service of Chairman. Section 14. Meetings of the Governing Board. Section 15. Secretary and other officers of the Foundation. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Committees of the Governing Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Powers and functions of the Governing Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Residents' Assembly. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Functions of Residents' Assembly. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Working Committee or Residents' Assembly. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Advisory Council. Section 22. Dissolution of the Foundation. Section 23. Grant by Central Government to the Foundation. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Duty to furnish returns, etc. Section 25. Borrowing powers of the Governing Board. Section 26. Accounts and audit. Section 27. Act to have overriding effect. Section 28. Contracts to cease to have effect unless ratified by the foundation. Section 29. Penalties. Section 30. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 31. Power to make rules. Section 32. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 34. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
